title: Introduction to CI/CD Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the basics of CI/CD.

questions.question: What is the primary role of CI/CD in software development?
options: To automate the building, testing, and deployment of your project's code changes

questions.question: Regarding the CI/CD, why is it beneficial to automate your project's building and testing?
options: Ensuring that each change is correctly tested before it's merged or deployed
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
